attribution: Tatoeba — https://tatoeba.org. Sentences contributed by individual users under CC-BY 2.0 FR. Per-sentence contributor names are preserved in the candidates JSONL (contributor_haw, contributor_en fields) to satisfy attribution flow-down obligations.
notes: Tatoeba is a crowd-sourced sentence corpus. All en-haw pairs are human-contributed and manually linked.
Per-sentence license may vary: most are CC-BY 2.0 FR; some older entries may be CC0. license_observed in candidates reflects the site-level license; downstream manifest review should confirm per-row.
prototype_only=true, release_eligible=false for this prototype. Attribution in source/source_url_* fields suffices for the private prototype.
alignment_method='manual' chosen because Tatoeba links are manually added by contributors (deterministic via link ID, not an embedding aligner).
register='unknown' chosen because Tatoeba has mixed-domain content (conversational, educational, encyclopedic).
Volume estimate: Hawaiian has ~100-600 sentences on Tatoeba (as of 2025); en-haw pairs are a subset.
